compiled_state.title: #2 Step 2: in-process _reads.py for show/list/deps/ready/search
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Add src/rebar/_reads.py importing the now-package-resident functions (reduce_all_tickets, search_states, apply_ticket_filters, ticket_graph._ready.find_ready_tickets, ticket_graph._graph.build_dep_graph) and replicate per-read quirks EXACTLY: per-read (exclude_archived, exclude_deleted) defaults [list (¬incl,False); search (¬incl,True); ready (False,False); deps (¬incl)+archived-target->RebarError]; per-read tracker-dir resolution (NOT uniform — deps ignores TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR; ready has no PROJECT_ROOT/REBAR_ROOT fallback); alias/short-id resolution via ticket_resolver.resolve_ticket_id; show-miss -> RebarError (not error dict); output via public_state; confirm show_ticket keys satisfy TicketStateOut.model_validate. DECISION REQUIRED: in-process reads drop the subprocess path's rate-limited 'git fetch origin tickets' — decide+document local-only-read semantics (the one user-visible behavior change). AC: object-level parity vs subprocess across the Step-0 matrix.

comments.body: Done: src/rebar/_reads.py in-process reads replicating each shim's contract. Commit 7d53bc5. Dropped-git-fetch decision documented in _reads.py.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
